task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS login screen is visible in the web browser.
The OpenSIS main dashboard or home page is visible, indicating the agent has successfully logged in.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the student search interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent has opened the 'Students' or 'Student Info' section and the search form is visible.
The search results list is displayed showing 'Sample Student' as a result.

task_completion.description: Display the detailed information for 'Sample Student'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed student record page for 'Sample Student' is open in the OpenSIS UI, showing specific details such as Date of Birth (2005-05-15), Gender (M), or Grade Level (10).

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with OpenSIS
integrity.visual_evidence: All interactions and results are shown within the Google Chrome browser running the OpenSIS web application, not via terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by querying the database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing MySQL/MariaDB queries being executed to fetch the student's information.

integrity.description: The student information is displayed in the actual OpenSIS application
integrity.visual_evidence: The final result is shown in the OpenSIS web interface, not typed out in a text editor or echoed in a terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The student to search for is 'Sample Student'. The correct student record contains the following details: Date of Birth: 2005-05-15, Gender: M, Grade Level: 10. Note: While the task description provides the password 'admin123', the actual password configured in the system is 'Admin@123'. The agent must successfully log in and display the student's record in the OpenSIS web UI.
